commit_message:
Bug 1926824 - Generate one block per line in the view source highlighter. r=hsivonen

This makes viewing source of the HTML spec usable.

Differential Revision: https://phabricator.services.mozilla.com/D226794

ranked_scenarios.summary: [HTML5] Re-implement view source syntax highlighting using the HTML5 parser

description.text: Make the Java to C++ translator generate a second copy of the tokenizer that reports all state transitions to a syntax highlighter that feeds into view source.
